chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5777 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 13-02-2025 Moulvi Iqbal Haider Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Abdul Samad, Advocate for NADRA Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Learned counsel states that Petitioner shall approach the Grievance Commissioner as mandated by Order dated 27.02.2023 in C.P. No. D-6944 of 2022. In view hereof the petition is disposed of. Judge Judge Amjad PS
